/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/omp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ksvd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/distorter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/image_process.cpp.o -o main  /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a
